prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger** (bolt-on for the **J37Y5** 3.7L V6, retaining direct injection while pushing power to 550whp with a custom **Hondata KPro V4** ECU reflash, optimized for 93 octane + E85 blend (30% mix) and supporting **ID1000x injectors** for fueling)

Full **TODA Racing** forged internals kit (pistons, connecting rods, and crankshaft) with **ACL Race Series bearings**, paired with a **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** and **TurboSmart Kompact 50mm BOV** to handle 22 psi of boost on a **GReddy Profec B Spec II** boost controller

Custom **K-Tuned** 3.5-inch titanium cat-back exhaust system with **Burns Stainless 4-2-1 headers** (equal-length, 1.75-inch primaries) and **MagnaFlow 25000-series catalytic converters** (200-cell, ultra-thin wall) for optimal scavenging and 10% torque increase at 4,500 RPM
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS** widebody kit (Type S-specific, 3-piece front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper with integrated diffuser) in **PPG Synergy Green** with **3M Matte Black** overlay, paired with **Rays TE37VOLK Racing** 20x10.5 ET20 (front) and 20x12 ET25 (rear) wheels

**Seibon Carbon** Type S-specific hood (dual functional vents, 30% weight reduction) and **AIT Racing** carbon fiber roof panel (pre-preg autoclave, 50% lighter than OEM), with **Vortex Generators** (Gurney flap-style) on the rear hatch for downforce at 120+ mph

**LuxuryTec** full LED conversion (OEM+ adaptive headlights with **Osram Night Breaker Laser** bulbs, **Morimoto XB35** fog lights, and **Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro** sequential turn signals) paired with **Vland** smoked taillight overlays (red/clear dual-layer, 30% tint)
